_note: External facts that drift. Each entry carries its own sourceUrl; always verify on the provider's site before relying on a number. Refreshed by scripts/update_free_tiers.py (see .github/workflows/update-free-tiers.yml), primary upstream github.com/cheahjs/free-llm-api-resources.

providers.name: Google Gemini (AI Studio)
providers.summary: Free tier in Google AI Studio. Gemini 2.5 Flash ~1,500 req/day; 2.5 Pro ~50 req/day. No card.

providers.name: Groq
providers.summary: Fast inference free tier. llama-3.3-70b ~1,000 req/day, ~100K tokens/day, 30 req/min. No card.

providers.name: Cerebras
providers.summary: Free tier ~1M tokens/day on Llama 3.3 70B and others. No card.

providers.name: OpenRouter (free models)
providers.summary: 28+ free models. 20 req/min, ~50 req/day (raised to ~1,000/day permanently after a one-time $10 top-up).

providers.name: Mistral (Experiment tier)
providers.summary: Experiment tier ~1B tokens/month — generous, but you must opt into data training to use it.

providers.name: GitHub Models
providers.summary: Free during preview; rate-limited per model tier. Uses your GitHub token.

providers.name: Cohere
providers.summary: Trial API key ~100 req/day, no card. Production keys are paid.

providers.name: DeepSeek
providers.summary: Trial grant ~10M tokens before paying. OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

providers.name: Together AI
providers.summary: Small trial credit (~$1) to evaluate; OpenAI-compatible.

providers.name: Anthropic (Claude)
providers.summary: No ongoing free tier; new accounts get a small one-time evaluation credit.

providers.name: OpenAI
providers.summary: No reliable ongoing free tier; limited free daily tokens have been offered via data-sharing opt-in.
